languages.text: "Порядок вещей таков: солдаты живут в казармах и получают пайки как обычные члены экипажа. Офицерам выделят личные каюты. Таков порядок, ниспосланный Богом-Императором".

"This is how things are: soldiers will live in barracks and receive rations just like the rest of the crew. Officers will be assigned private quarters. This is the order of things bestowed upon us all by the God-Emperor."
languages.original_text: "Порядок вещей таков: солдаты живут в казармах и получают пайки как обычные члены экипажа. Офицерам выделят личные каюты. Таков порядок, ниспосланный Богом-Императором".

traits.locale_text: "This is how the things are: soldiers will live in barracks and receive rations just like the rest of the crew. Officers will be assigned private quarters. This is the order of things bestowed upon us all by the God-Emperor."

"This is how things are: soldiers will live in barracks and receive rations just like the rest of the crew. Officers will be assigned private quarters. This is the order of things bestowed upon us all by the God-Emperor."

languages.text: 「これは神皇帝によって我々に与えられた秩序である」
languages.original_text: "This is the order of things bestowed upon us all by the God-Emperor."

languages.text: "İşler şöyle yürüyecek: Askerler kışlalarda yaşayacak ve mürettebatın geri kalanı gibi tayın alacaklar. Subaylara özel kamaralar tahsis edilecek. Bu, hepimize Tanrı İmparator tarafından bahşedilen düzendir."
languages.original_text: "This is how things are: soldiers will live in barracks and receive rations just like the rest of the crew. Officers will be assigned private quarters. This is the order of things bestowed upon us all by the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "İşler şöyle yürüyecek: Askerler kışlalarda yaşayacak ve mürettebatın geri kalanı gibi tayın alacaklar. Subaylara özel kamaralar tahsis edilecek. Bu, hepimize Tanrı İmparator tarafından bahşedilen düzendir."

languages.text: “目前情况是这样：士兵与其他船员一样，住营房、领口粮；军官则配有独立舱室。这一切秩序，皆由神皇赐予。”
languages.original_text: "This is how things are: soldiers will live in barracks and receive rations just like the rest of the crew. Officers will be assigned private quarters. This is the order of things bestowed upon us all by the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: “目前情况是这样：士兵与其他船员一样，住营房、领口粮；军官则配有独立舱室。这一切秩序，皆由神皇赐予。”

languages.text: "So sieht es aus: Soldaten werden in Kasernen leben und Rationen erhalten wie der Rest der Crew. Offizieren werden private Quartiere zugewiesen. Das ist die Ordnung der Dinge, die uns vom Gottimperator auferlegt wurde."
languages.original_text: "This is how things are: soldiers will live in barracks and receive rations just like the rest of the crew. Officers will be assigned private quarters. This is the order of things bestowed upon us all by the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "So sieht es aus: Soldaten werden in Kasernen leben und Rationen erhalten wie der Rest der Crew. Offizieren werden private Quartiere zugewiesen. Das ist die Ordnung der Dinge, die uns vom Gottimperator auferlegt wurde."

languages.text: « C'est comme ça que nous fonctionnons : les soldats vivent dans la caserne et reçoivent des rations, comme le reste de l'équipage. Les officiers disposent de quartiers privés. C'est l'ordre des choses établi par l'Empereur-Dieu lui-même. »
languages.original_text: "This is how things are: soldiers will live in barracks and receive rations just like the rest of the crew. Officers will be assigned private quarters. This is the order of things bestowed upon us all by the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: « C'est comme ça que nous fonctionnons : les soldats vivent dans la caserne et reçoivent des rations, comme le reste de l'équipage. Les officiers disposent de quartiers privés. C'est l'ordre des choses établi par l'Empereur-Dieu lui-même. »

languages.text: «Así son las cosas: los soldados vivirán en el barracón y recibirán raciones, al igual que el resto de la tripulación. Los oficiales tendrán camarotes privados. Esa es la jerarquía que nos otorga a todos el Dios Emperador».
languages.original_text: "This is how things are: soldiers will live in barracks and receive rations just like the rest of the crew. Officers will be assigned private quarters. This is the order of things bestowed upon us all by the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: «Así son las cosas: los soldados vivirán en el barracón y recibirán raciones, al igual que el resto de la tripulación. Los oficiales tendrán camarotes privados. Esa es la jerarquía que nos otorga a todos el Dios Emperador».
